user.title: Connect to Traefik
user.description: Provide the URL of your Traefik instance and the API key from your Traefik static config (api.dashboard / api.insecure).

yaml.title: YAML configuration detected
yaml.description: Configure traefik: block in configuration.yaml. The integration validates the URL + token before saving.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Traefik — check URL, network, and that the API is enabled.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid bearer token. Rotate the token in Traefik's static config.
error.api_disabled: Traefik's API is not enabled — add `api: insecure: true` or `api: dashboard: true` to your static config.

abort.already_configured: This Traefik instance is already configured.
